title: CaliburnSMP
description: The modpack for the Caliburn SMP
body:
## The Official modpack for the Caliburn SMP (Required to play)
Modpack works in both single and multiplayer.


  ## **Features:**  
### **New block variants**
- Vertical slabs
- Sideways stairs
- Crafting tables ,Composters, Barrels & Chests in all wood types




### **Sound Improvements**
- Dynamic surround sound (works with included Simple Voice Chat Mod)
- Improved sound effects

### **Social**
- In Game voice chat

### **Other**

**JourneyMap:** In game minimap/worldMap

**Farmers Delight:** Farming/Food

**JEI (Just Enough Items):** Recipe and item lookup

**AXIOM:** Editor For minecraft (Like blender kinda)

**ETC...**

note: version 0.8 adds and removes some mods

### Added as of 0.8
Added
- create mods
- first person animations in third person
- xaero's map & minimap (replacing Journey map)
- inventory sorting
- backpacks
- graves (death markers)
- veinminer/tunnelminer

Removed
- fancy menu
- journey map
- axiom

### Update[1.0]: Bosses Arise

Added
- Dungeon Now Loading
- Withering heights
- Ultris:Boss Expansion
- Bosses Of Mass Destruction
